calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Larry L. Thompson To Perpetuate Testimony Of Larry E. Thompson By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Aug-19-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Geoff T. Sloniker of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing via CourtCall for petitioner Larry L. Thompson.
Shelly K. Tinkoff of SELMAN BREITMAN LLP (415-979-0400), specially appearing via CourtCall for specially appearing respondent Contra Costa Electric.

RULING:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Petition of Larry L. Thompson to Perpetuate Testimony of Larry E. Thompson by Videotaped Deposition is GRANTED under Code of Civil Procedure section 2035.010. Petitioner filed proofs of service as to all prospective defendants named in the petition. Conditional non-opposition filed by Temporary Plant Cleaners, Inc. All parties must file a Notice of Special Appearance within two court days upon receipt of this order. he deposition is to take place by Zoom technology within 30 days of this order unless the parties agree otherwise. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Reporter: Janice H. Dispo of VERITEXT, CSR #13299, jdispo.csr@gmail.com (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/CML)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Larry L. Thompson To Perpetuate Testimony Of Larry E. Thompson By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Jul-22-2021 Continued To Aug-19-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing via CourtCall for petitioner Larry L. Thompson.

RULING:
Hearing held, contested, and the Court continues Petition of Larry L. Thompson to Perpetuate Testimony of Larry E. Thompson by Videotaped Deposition to Thursday, Aug-19-2021 at 9:30am in Dept. 503 for courtesy copies of the Petition and Reply. Petitioner to give notice to defendants including opposing party Temporary Plant Cleaners to submit courtesy copy for conditional non-opposition. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
